doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The provided text falsely summarizes ABA Model Rule 5.5, omitting its actual provisions regarding multi-jurisdictional practice while inventing language and section headers that do not appear in the official ABA text.
